violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH CFP at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS)food is being prepared, handled, and /or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the areas underneath/behind all kitchen equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, old droppings and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

The ceiling tiles, in the front prep area, floor tiles in walk-in cooler and back kitchen area observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH CFP at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. PIC relocated can opener to 3-bay sink. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

The cutting board on the (sandwich unit #2) is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the areas underneath/behind all kitchen equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, old droppings and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

The ceiling tiles, in the front prep area, floor tiles in walk-in cooler and back kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2026

The screen door to the outside, located in the back kitchen area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2024
The gasket to the walk-in cooler door was observed to be in poor repair (Torn). Equipment is top be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following kitchen equipment were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris... - Internal surfaces of refrigeration and freezer units - Equipment shelving Non- FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
The condensate from the air conditioner unit is draining into a sink. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2024

The floor and walls under and behind equipment in the kitchen area were observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2024

The tile flooring in the kitchen area and walk-in cooler was observed to be in poor repair/cracked/missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025
